title: Camera for Twitch
description: This plugin was created based on the camera from the private MineSheld server. With this plugin, you can stream your game to all streaming platforms!
body:
This plugin was created based on the camera from the private MineSheld server. 
With this plugin, you can stream your game to all streaming platforms!

## !ATTENTION!
### The plugin does not have the function to independently broadcast the game on Twitch. To broadcast the screen, you need an additional machine with a launched stream and game!

This plugin will allow you to create a unique function on your server. Using it, you can create cameras that will broadcast everything that happens on the server to a streaming platform.
You can also personalize the display of text on the screen in the plugin config.

To get started, install the plugin and its dependencies
If your version is 1.19+. Install [Dependencies No. 1](https://modrinth.com/plugin/camera-from-minesheld/version/Dependencies1), [Dependencies No.2](https://modrinth.com/plugin/camera-from-minesheld/version/Dependencies2) and the [Camera for Twitch](https://modrinth.com/plugin/camera-from-minesheld/version/1.0-Release)

And if your version is 1.18.2 or lower. Install Dependencies No.1.2 Dependencies No. 2 and the Camera for the Twitch

**As of plugin version 2.0, plugin dependencies are no longer needed!**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/rWAesvSduaQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Plugin commands:
- /camera reload- Reloading the plugin
- /camera create- <id> <title> Create a camera
- /camera teleport <id>- Teleport to the camera
- /camera toggle <player>- Toggles camera mode for player (The command appeared in version 2.0. Before this, this parameter is configured in the config)
- /camera list- Camera list
- /camera delete <id>- Delete the camera
